Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial, Maintaining Current Trial Date; And Extending Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Aug-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Louis Reyes and Pauline Reyes
Mirna Jeftic Scheffy of HAWKINS PARNELL THACKSTON & YOUNG LLP (415-766-3225) appearing for defendant / opposing party ArvinMeritor, Inc.
Kurt Putnam of WFBM, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / opposing party Electric Laboratories, Inc.
Constance Fraenkel of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, MAINTAINING CURRENT TRIAL DATE; AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to maintain the trial date with preference status is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). The official trial date of June 13, 2016 is maintained with preference status. The next return date remains October 11, 2016. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is December 9, 2016. All dates related to discovery, motions and disclosures remain dictated by the June 13, 2016 trial date. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers. These confidential demands must be submitted to Pang Ly by October 3, 2016 at 12:00p.m. Settlement conference in room 603 at 9:30a.m. on October 6, 2016. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with the Court pursuant to San Francisco Local Rules of Court Rule 5 on October 11, 2016 at 1:30p.m. in Department 503. The parties shall comply with Local Rule 5.0 and provide a confidential settlement statement by October 6, 2016 at 2:00p.m. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Cindy Garis of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 402 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bill D. Fountain of HAWKINS PARNELL THACKSTON & YOUNG (415-766-3202), appearing for defendant / moving party ArvinMeritor, Inc.
Tiffany Viveros of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Louis Reyes & Pauline Reyes

RULING:
DEFENDANT ARVINMERITOR, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant ArvinMeritor, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that plaintiffs' claims are time-barred pursuant to C.C.P. 340.2. However even if defendant did sustain its initial burden, the deposition testimony and declaration of Mr. Reyes would create a triable issue whether plaintiffs' claims are time-barred. Defendant sustained its burden of demonstrating that exposure to asbestos did not cause or contribute to Mr. Reyes' colon cancer. The declaration of Dr. Richard Cohen creates a triable issue whether exposure to asbestos caused or contributed to Mr. Reyes' colon cancer. Defendant's request for an Evidence Code 402 hearing is denied. Plaintiffs' objections to defendant's Exhibits N, O and P are overruled. Plaintiffs' objections to the deposition testimony of Dr. Cohen submitted with defendant's reply are overruled. Defendant's objections to the declarations of Mr. Reyes and Dr. Cohen are overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Kimberly R. Hendershott of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12552 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Continued To May-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant Arvinmeritor, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is continued on the court's own motion to May 19, 2016. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Matter not reported (503/GLW)
